evals.prompt: Turn this PRD for adding saved payment methods into issues agents can pick up independently.
evals.expected_output: The agent breaks the PRD into tracer-bullet vertical slices, presents dependencies and covered user stories, and asks for approval before publishing.
assertions: Creates thin vertical slices that cross integration layers end to end.
Shows title, blocked-by relationships, and user stories covered for each slice.
Asks whether granularity and dependencies are correct before publishing.

evals.prompt: Use the approved breakdown and publish the issues to our tracker.
evals.expected_output: The agent previews final issue titles, bodies, labels, destination, and dependency order, then publishes blockers first and does not close or modify the parent issue.
assertions: Previews final issue metadata before publishing unless confirmation was already granted.
Applies the ready-for-agent triage label unless instructed otherwise.
References real blocking issue identifiers after creation.
Does not close or modify the parent issue.
